{"id":"project-LICHEN-58on","title":"Zephyr fuel_gauge.h header triggers sign-compare with LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS","description":"The power_providers test variant fails to build because Zephyr's fuel_gauge.h header (lines 299, 352) has sign comparison warnings that become errors with LICHEN's -Werror flag.

Error: comparison of integer expressions of different signedness in z_impl_fuel_gauge_get_props and z_impl_fuel_gauge_set_props.

Options:
1. Add -Wno-error=sign-compare to LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS
2. Wrap fuel_gauge.h include with pragma to suppress warning
3. Upstream a fix to Zephyr

Related to hal/lichen.hal.power_providers test.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T05:46:37.376052Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T05:46:37.376099Z","labels":["bug","build","hal"]}

new_value: Fixed by changing int loop index to size_t in z_impl_fuel_gauge_get_props() and z_impl_fuel_gauge_set_props() in Zephyr fuel_gauge.h to eliminate sign-compare with size_t len under LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS. 3 clean codereview passes (project-LICHEN-osdg, project-LICHEN-clo9, project-LICHEN-qnht) with zero findings filed and fixed. Pragmas in hal.c/main.c can now be removed in follow-up if desired. Verified no behavioral change.
